chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 816 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 24.09.2025 This reference application is pending since 2019 without any progress. It appears that matter is listed for orders as to non-prosecution ever since. On 07.09.2020, following order was passed: “07.09.2020 Mr. Aminullah Siddiqui, AAG. At the request of learned Deputy Attorney General two weeks’ time is allowed to comply office objections. Learned DAG may come prepared to assist this court as to whether the applicant Additional Director FIA Anti-Corruption Circle, Karachi, can file Reference under Section 196 of the Customs Act 1969 or not? Adjourned.” Neither aforesaid order has been complied with nor have office objection. Applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
